items.title: We’ve watched you create the impossible with @FlowbyGoogle… today, the Flow family is growing.…
items.content: We’ve watched you create the impossible with @FlowbyGoogle… today, the Flow family is growing. 🚀 Meet @googleflowmusic (formerly ProducerAI) - a standalone site that helps you create, share, and remix original music. Using natural language prompts, you can turn your imagination into fully produced tracks. 🌊 Flow = Images & Videos 🎵 Flow Music = Songs & Playlists
